title: Tetra Apotheosis Fix
description: Fixes compat issues with tetra and apotheosis
body:
# Tetra Apotheosis Fix

Fix incompats between tetra and apotheosis when they are found

Currently fixes the following issues:
- Tetra's Bows and Crossbows not being considered bows and crossbows by Apotheosis
